title: RM-05C record real repair
objective:
Run script:
"""
queue_path = Path('governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
for task in queue.get('tasks', []):
    if task.get('id') == 'RM-05':
        task['status'] = 'DONE'
        task['sha'] = '1e7b445f549724fb6e31a48e6deec4e75573a54b'
        task['completed_at'] = '2026-06-04T14:23:20Z'
        task['audit_reopen_resolved'] = True
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T14:24:00Z'
queue['queue_state'] = 'EMPTY_NO_PENDING_TASKS'
queue['next_action'] = 'await operator or Claude to add next tasks; do not invent tasks'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
log_path = Path('governance/logs/execution_log.jsonl')
existing = log_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if log_path.exists() else ''
line = json.dumps({'date':'2026-06-04T14:23:20Z','id':'RM-05','trace_id':'rm05_real_runner_repair_pattern','sha':'1e7b445f549724fb6e31a48e6deec4e75573a54b','status':'done','audit_reopen_resolved':True,'workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False)
if line not in existing:
    existing += line + '\n'
log_path.write_text(existing, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(log_path))
runner = Path('governance/runners/contour_lifecycle_runner.py')
status_file = Path('governance/state/kz1_runners_status.json')
all_valid = False
if runner.exists() and status_file.exists():
    status = json.loads(status_file.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    all_valid = len(runner.read_bytes()) > 50 and status.get('all_valid') == True
state = Path('governance/state/RM05C_RECORD_REAL_REPAIR_CLOSE_QUEUE.json')
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'RM-05C','trace_id':'rm05c_record_real_repair_close_queue','status':'completed' if all_valid else 'blocked','release_pass':all_valid,'recorded_step':'RM-05','recorded_sha':'1e7b445f549724fb6e31a48e6deec4e75573a54b','contour_lifecycle_runner_bytes':len(runner.read_bytes()) if runner.exists() else 0,'kz1_runners_status_exists':status_file.exists(),'all_valid':all_valid,'workflow_files_touched':False,'queue_state':'EMPTY_NO_PENDING_TASKS' if all_valid else 'BLOCKED'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/RM05C_RECORD_REAL_REPAIR_CLOSE_QUEUE.md')
report.write_text('# RM-05C | Record real RM-05 repair and close queue\nStatus: ' + ('completed' if all_valid else 'blocked') + '\nDate: 2026-06-04\n\nRM-05 reopened audit defect resolved with SHA 1e7b445f549724fb6e31a48e6deec4e75573a54b. contour_lifecycle_runner.py is non-empty and kz1_runners_status.json exists with all_valid=true. ACTIVE_QUEUE has no PENDING tasks after RM-05. Workflow lock respected.\n\nNext: queue empty; do not invent tasks.\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
"""No issue comments.
